steps.title: Identify the clause structure
steps.content: The blank must supply the subject and verb of a clause where “68th in a global ranking” is the predicate adjective. The subject refers to “the constitution of Lithuania” (singular), requiring a singular subject pronoun + linking verb.

steps.title: Select the correct pronoun form
steps.content: The contraction “it's” (it is) provides the singular subject + linking verb needed. “Its” is possessive and “their”/”they're” are plural, both wrong for a singular subject + verb. That matches choice C — C is correct.
